api_token.description: Merge account-wide API token, sent as Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer <api_token>). Never logged.

account_token.description: Merge per-linked-account token selecting which connected end-customer account to read, sent as the X-Account-Token header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Merge ATS Common Model v1 API base URL. Override for other Merge categories (hris, accounting, ...) or test servers.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects modified at or after this time are read on a fresh sync (no persisted cursor yet).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
